project: Milan Safety Map (米兰安全地图 / Mappa della Sicurezza di Milano)

transcripts.text: 你做一个米兰的安全地图，也就是说，我希望这个App打开的话就可以看到米兰市的整个地图，然后的话，我可以看到就是那些地方发生过什么样的案件，能有一个分类的视图，能有一些这个犯罪案件数量的图，热力图，就是我希望这个App的话以后可以帮助大家识别这个城市的不安全区域。请你去寻找一些公开的可信的数据源，来做这样一个项目，然后做完了以后能跑了，看一下。就是你打开这个App，其实主要就是看一些过去的这些犯罪的，各种各样的犯罪的一个数据，然后尤其是从地图角度展示的，什么热力图啊，然后圈圈的大小的图啊，还有一些分类的，案件种类的这种图。对，一步一步迭代吧，先做第一步。最后记得把我说的这些话和这个prompt也存起来，我后面好再去看。那么，现在咱们先做英文版的，和也可以，就是中文、英文、意大利语版，都可以切换。

Make a safety map of Milan. That means I hope that when this App is opened, you can see the entire map of the city of Milan. Then, I can see what kind of cases happened in those places, have a classified view, and have some charts of the number of criminal cases, heatmaps. I hope this App can help everyone identify unsafe areas of the city in the future. Please look for some open and credible data sources to do such a project, and then make sure it runs and takes a look. When you open this App, it is mainly to see some past crime data of various kinds, especially displayed from a map perspective, like heatmaps, bubble/circle size maps, and some classified views of incident categories. Yes, iterate step-by-step, start with the first step. Finally, remember to store what I said and this prompt so that I can look at them later. Now, let's make an English version first, and we can also have Chinese, English, and Italian versions, all switchable.
